listening.title: Listening: Who is that?
listening.transcript: She is the woman who won a major award last year. He is an engineer who works for a big company.

questions.question: What did the woman win?
questions.explanation: "She is the woman who won a major award last year."

listening.title: Listening: A meaningful place
listening.transcript: This is the café where we first met. I remember the day when we started this project.

questions.question: Where did they first meet?
questions.explanation: "This is the café where we first met."
